mapper.update: update kh_disease set name_english = #{nameEnglish,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name_chinese = #{nameChinese,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, category_id = #{categoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, source_url = #{sourceUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, spider_job_id = #{spiderJobId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, check_status = #{checkStatus,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where disease_id = #{diseaseId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select disease_id, name_english, name_chinese, category_id, source_url, spider_job_id, check_status, create_time, update_time from kh_disease where disease_id = #{diseaseId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
select disease_id, name_english, name_chinese, category_id, source_url, spider_job_id, check_status, create_time, update_time from kh_disease
